utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with explicit details and associated costs. Each section contains full descriptions: the health_coverage specifies type (physical and mental), included services, and monthly cost; property_coverage specifies type (home/contents) and cost inclusion; travel_coverage specifies travel insurance and cost inclusion; additional_services specifies enhancements and cost inclusion; total_budget gives both monthly and annual breakdown with context. Therefore, all five required items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists one comprehensive package named 'InsurePlus Standard Plan7' that includes physical and mental health coverage, property coverage, travel coverage, and additional services such as wellness programs and global assistance. The name closely matches the ground-truth entry 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under multiple categories. Therefore, the relevant mappings are: (1) Health coverage → InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical_health rating 10, mental_health rating 7); (2) Property coverage → InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 10); (3) Travel coverage → InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel_insurance rating 10); (4) Additional services mention wellness programs (rating 3) and global assistance/emergency coordination (most similar to 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 4). These correspondences give a complete mapping of all items in the final coverage plan to their ground-truth ratings.

final_package_text:

    "health_coverage": "InsurePlus Standard Plan7 - Physical and mental health insurance with preventive care, prescription coverage, telemedicine, immediate specialist access, and global coverage - €315/month (comprehensive package includes all coverage types)",
    "property_coverage": "Business equipment and electronics coverage for photography work and home contents protection with temporary accommodation coverage - included in €315/month comprehensive package", 
    "travel_coverage": "International travel insurance with adventure sports coverage for hiking and high-altitude activities, emergency coordination, and global assistance - included in €315/month comprehensive package",

    "total_budget": "€315/month (€3,780/year) - increase of €130/month from previous €185/month total cost. Coverage activated with policy number issued, starts 2024-01-01, meets March 31st German freelancer compliance deadline"
